SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARCIA SHEW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT US TAX LIEN ASSOCIATION, LLC (JEREMY HARRIS) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEW, MARCIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT US TAX LIEN ASSOCIATION, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
